title: Policy: Policy applied - Turn off WiFi
scenario: Verify that policy-affected settings remain locked and show an offline modification popup when Wi-Fi is turned off and the app is restarted on a device with policies applied.
steps: Ensure the device has policies applied.
Turn off Wi-Fi on the device.
Attempt to modify a policy-affected (locked) setting.
expected: Policy-affected settings remain locked after restarting the app with Wi-Fi off. Attempting to modify a locked setting shows a popup indicating settings cannot be modified offline.
